definition: A critical conceptual unit within the top term domain of the Exegesis. Mentions: 64.

folder 32 - 007
In a sense, positive action of any kind is an involvement in the world. It takes the world as real. Balking, oddly, carries perhaps a greater weight, since the step prior to affirming God seems to be the denial of the world. (Or: the road to affirming the true God stems from the initial denying of the world.) The Rampar..."
